hibernate-mapping.query: select b from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.BillingTemplate b where b.name = ?
select count(r.billingTemplateId) from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.RelatedBillingTemplate r where r.billingTemplateId = ?
select bt.id, bt.name from com.mckesson.eig.roi.admin.model.BillingTemplate bt order by bt.name asc
hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT billingTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq id, billingTemplate.Created_By_Seq createdBy, billingTemplate.Modified_Dt modifiedDate, billingTemplate.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, billingTemplate.Record_Version recordVersion, billingTemplate.Organization_Seq orgId, billingTemplate.Name name, billingTemplate.Description description, billingTemplate.Active active
FROM cabinet..ROI_BillingTemplate billingTemplate, cabinet..ROI_RequestorTypeToBillingTemplate typeToTemplate
WHERE billingTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq = typeToTemplate.ROI_BillingTemplate_Seq AND typeToTemplate.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = :requestorTypeId
